title: IDF Strikes IRGC Main Headquarters in Tehran
detail: Israeli Defense Forces announced strikes on one of the IRGC's main headquarters in Tehran alongside several other military buildings in the capital. Prime Minister Netanyahu stated Israel 'is continuing to strike, in Iran and in Lebanon' and is 'crushing the missile program and the nuclear program.' Netanyahu also revealed two Iranian nuclear scientists were eliminated in recent days.

title: IDF Captures Two Elite Hezbollah Radwan Operatives in South Lebanon
detail: IDF troops from the Givati Brigade captured two armed Hezbollah operatives belonging to the elite Radwan Force during operations in southern Lebanon. The operatives were spotted planning to launch anti-tank missiles and subsequently surrendered. Forces located weapons and military equipment at the site.

title: Airstrikes Kill 15 PMF Fighters in Iraq — Deadliest Strike of the War
detail: Airstrikes in Iraq killed 15 members of the Popular Mobilization Forces (PMF), the Iran-backed Shiite militia umbrella group — the deadliest single attack on the group since the war began. A PMF commander was among those killed. The strike targeted a residence of PMF leader Falih al-Fayadh in Mosul; al-Fayadh was not present. At least 30 others were wounded. The PMF blamed the United States.
